'''Romain Franco''' (born 5 June 1998) is a French [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|wg}}er for [[Racing Club Albi XIII]] in the [[Super XIII]].

==Playing career==
===Catalans Dragons===
In 2021 he made his [[Catalans Dragons|Catalans]] debut in the [[Super League]] against [[Hull Kingston Rovers]].<ref name="Super League: Hull KR 16-23 Catalans - Dragons beat Rovers for 12th straight win">{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/580632245|title=Super League: Hull KR 16-23 Catalans - Dragons beat Rovers for 12th straight win|publisher=BBC|date=2 August 2021|accessdate=30 July 2022}}{{dead link|date=September 2025|bot=medic}}{{cbignore|bot=medic}}</ref>

===Bradford Bulls (loan)===
On 2 Aug 2024 it was reported that he had signed for [[Bradford Bulls]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on loan until the end of the 2024 season<ref>{{cite web|website=Telegraph & Argus|date=2 Aug 2024|accessdate=17 Oct 2024|author=Nathan Atkinson|title=Bradford Bulls get winger in on loan from Wakefield Trinity|url=https://www.thetelegraphandargus.co.uk/sport/sportlatest/24494955.bradford-bulls-get-winger-loan-wakefield-trinity/}}</ref>

===Racing Club Albi XIII===
On 7 Nov 2024 it was reported that he had signed for [[Racing Club Albi XIII]] in the [[Super XIII]]<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=7 Nov 2024|author=Ben Olawumi|title=Dual international sees next move confirmed following Wakefield Trinity exit|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/dual-international-sees-next-move-confirmed-following-wakefield-trinity-exit}}</ref>

==International==
On 27 Oct 2024 it was reported that he made his début for {{rlnt|France}} v {{rlnt|Wales}} in the final European qualifier for the 2026 Rugby League World Cup<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=27 Oct 2024|author=Aaron Bower|title=How France can qualify for 2026 Rugby League World Cup after dashing Wales’ hopes|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/how-france-can-qualify-for-2026-rugby-league-world-cup-after-dashing-wales-hopes}}</ref>
